2003October 25, 2003

🇫🇷 Poitiers, France

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Poitiers, France, October 25, 2003 -- October 31, 2003

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2003-10-poitiers-france

14 Resolutions

598Plenary
Form Category A liaison with ECCMA and appoint Gerry Radack
SC 4 accepts the request from the Electronic Commerce Code Management Association (ECCMA) to form a two-way Category A liaison, and appoints Gerry Radack as liaison officer from SC 4 to ECCMA.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
597Plenary
Establish task force for dictionaries and libraries white paper
SC 4 establishes a task force to produce a white paper on the scope, relationship between ISO 10303, ISO 13584 and ISO 15926 and their industrial usage to meet business requirements for the definit...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
596Plenary
Endorse response regarding public availability of SC 4 standards
SC 4 appreciates the freedom to permit distribution of these standards to other ISO and IEC groups for further standards development.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
595Plenary
Appoint Günter Staub as liaison officer to OAGI
SC 4 appoints Günter Staub to serve as the liaison officer to OAGI and requests its Secretariat to make the appointment accordingly.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
594Plenary
Nominate delegates to ISO/IEC Guide ad hoc meeting in Berlin
SC 4 nominates Wolfgang Wilkes, Guy Pierra, Karlheinz Rosan, Nils Sandsmark, Tim King and Norman Swindells to attend the meeting.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
593Plenary
Review proposal to update Industrial Data Framework as Technical Report
SC 4 requests member bodies to review the proposal to update the Industrial Data Framework as an ISO Technical Report and to indicate to the Secretariat by the end of December 2003 whether there wi...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
592Plenary
Inform ISO/TC 10 of impact of ISO 16792 and encourage consensus
SC 4 requests its secretariat to inform ISO/TC 10 that the planned publication of ISO 16792 will lead to significant changes in already existing and published standards by SC 4.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
591Plenary
Submit liaison statement to ISO/TC 59 regarding building construction modeling
SC 4 requests its secretariat to submit a liaison statement to ISO/TC 59 "Building construction" explaining the area of work of SC 4, especially to point out the activities of its WG 2 and WG 3 wor...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
590Plenary
Request ISO/CS to confirm adjustability of development milestones
SC 4 therefore requests ISO/CS to confirm that the intermediate milestones of the new timeframes can be adjusted to allow appropriate work planning, within the overall time limits given.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
589Plenary
Cancel STEP Part 314 due to lack of progress
SC 4 agrees to cancel STEP Part 314 due to lack of progress.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
588Plenary
Approve project leaders and editors for SC 4 projects
SC 4 approves the following new project leaders or project editors for the associated SC 4 projects: |=== |Project |Leader |Editor |ISO 10303-0058 |Rolf Lervik | |ISO 10303-0240 |Chiaki Sakamoto |L...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

Acclamation
Acclamation

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 would like to thank Mr. John Dunford for his significant contributions and support to the SC 4 community. His untiring efforts as Working Group 3, Team 8 (Product Life-Cycle) Team Leader, his ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
